measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Restores Everett's emergency medical services levy to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value in 2027 and 2028 for emergency medical care, paramedic services, and related expenses.
measures.cost_line: Restores the EMS levy rate to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Sales and Use Tax for Enhanced Public Safety Services
measures.what_it_does: Imposes a 0.1% sales and use tax for public safety and criminal justice purposes, including police staffing, dispatch, courts, prosecution, public defense, jail services, and related support.
measures.cost_line: Adds a one-tenth of one percent (0.1%) sales and use tax.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Replacement of Expiring Educational Programs and Operations Levy
measures.what_it_does: Replaces an expiring educational programs and operations levy for 2027 through 2030 to fund programs and services not funded by the state.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes four annual levies of $950,000, with estimated rates declining from $1.24 to $1.02 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Tax Levy for Maintenance and Operations
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a four-year excess property tax levy for maintenance and operations to maintain fire and emergency medical services.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes $450,000 per year from 2027 through 2030, with estimated rates from $0.6214 to $0.6031 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Restores the district's emergency medical services levy and sets a six-year limit factor for levy increases.
measures.cost_line: Restores the EMS levy to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value in 2027 and allows up to 106% annual increases through 2032.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Restores the district's regular EMS property tax levy and authorizes inflation-indexed increases for five following years.
measures.cost_line: Restores the EMS levy to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value for collection in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Bonds for New Replacement Hospital
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes construction and equipping of a replacement hospital and related capital improvements for EvergreenHealth Monroe.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes up to $382,000,000 in general obligation bonds maturing within 30 years, repaid through annual excess property taxes.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Regular Property Tax Levy Lid Lift for Support of Public Library Services
measures.what_it_does: Restores the library district's regular property tax levy rate for operations, maintenance, and library services.
measures.cost_line: Restores the levy rate to $0.47 per $1,000 of assessed value for collection in 2027.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for the listed public service.
